source_intake_record.raw_question_text: An observer measures the length of a 10 m rod to be 8 m when it is in motion as shown in figure. What is the speed of the rod relative to the observer?

image_manifest contains 1 existing image with high readability_score=0.9494
multi_step: Solving requires applying a physics relation between proper length and observed length, then solving for speed

multiple-choice format (4 choices) slightly lowers open-ended reasoning depth
verifiability: answer_type=short_text and answer_text is a specific numeric expression '( 0.6c )'
choices are provided, enabling straightforward option-level checking
The claimed answer can be checked against a standard relativistic length-contraction formula
